zh.lifeSummary: 當Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland於大約1017年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德弗拉爾丁恩時，他的父親Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem36歲，母親Othelindis von Haldensleben33歲。他於1050年與Gertrud Billung von Sachsen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1061年6月28日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德內德莫特享年45歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland于大约1017年出生在荷兰-拉藍德弗拉爾丁恩时，他的父亲Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem36岁，母亲Othelindis von Haldensleben33岁。他于1050年与Gertrud Billung von Sachsen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1061年6月28日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德內德莫特享年45岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Floris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a personal name derived from Latin flos, genitive floris ‘flower’.
Italian (Sardinia): plural form of   Flore  .
Greek: derivative of Floros , or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name, such as Florakis.

variants.name: Flore
meanings: Name borne in Roman mythology by the goddess of flowers and the spring (a derivative of Latin flos ‘flower’, genitive floris). It is also the feminine form of the old Roman family name Florus, likewise derived from flos. Flora was little used in England before the 18th century, when it was imported from Scotland. In 1746 Flora Macdonald ( 1722–90 ) of Milton in South Uist helped Bonnie Prince Charlie to escape from there to the Island of Skye, disguised as a woman, after his defeat at Culloden. In fact, Flora was merely an Anglicized form of her Gaelic name, Fionnaghal, a variant of Fionnguala ( see Fionnuala ). However, her fame made the name Flora popular in the Highlands and elsewhere.

en.lifeSummary: When Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland was born about 1017, in Vlaardingen, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem, was 36 and his mother, Othelindis von Haldensleben, was 33. He married Gertrud Billung von Sachsen in 1050. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 June 1061, in Nederhemert, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 45, and was buried in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland est né environ 1017, à Vlaardingen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Othelindis von Haldensleben, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Gertrud Billung von Sachsen en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 juin 1061, à Nederhemert, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.Egmond, Frisia, Duchy of Lotharingia, Ho: Egmond aan den Hoef, Bergen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland um 1017 in Vlaardingen, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem 36 und seine Mutter Othelindis von Haldensleben 33. Er hat 1050 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Juni 1061 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Nederhemert, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland è nato il circa 1017 nel Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Othelindis von Haldensleben, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Gertrud Billung von Sachsen nel 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 giugno 1061, nel Nederhemert, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Frieslandが約1017年にオランダズイド-hオランドvラアルディンジェンで生まれた時，父Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalemは36歳，母Othelindis von Haldenslebenは33歳であった。1050年にGertrud Billung von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1061年6月28日にオランダジェルダーランドネデルヘマートで45歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンにて埋葬された。

ko.Egmond, Frisia, Duchy of Lotharingia, Ho: 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 버겐 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.lifeSummary: Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland(이)가 대략 1017년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 블라아르딩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Othelindis von Haldensleben(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1050년 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1061년 6월 28일 네덜란드 글델랜드 네더헤머트에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland nasceu aproximadamente 1017, em Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Othelindis von Haldensleben, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrud Billung von Sachsen em 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de junho de 1061, em Nederhemert, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland родился около 1017 г. в местности влаардинген, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Othelindis von Haldensleben, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud Billung von Sachsen в 1050 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 июня 1061 г. в местности недиремирт, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland nació aproximadamente 1017, en Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dietrich III de Hollande de Jérusalem, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Othelindis von Haldensleben, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Gertrud Billung von Sachsen en 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de junio de 1061, en Nederhemert, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos.
